title: Magma Ticket formatter
description:
This plugin will automatically Getinfo that may be wanted in a Ticket
For MagmaFoundation
body:
## What is this

This Plugin is Specifically made to work with The MagmaFoundations Server Software,This will Generate a file called Ticket.txt with the latest logs if you have McLogs installed too.

## How to use

**1.** Install the Plugin onto your [Magmafoundation](https://magmafoundation.org/) server  
**2.** Start the server.  
**3.** Run /mtf in console    
**4.** Go to /plugins/MagmaTicketFormater  
**5.** View/Submit your Ticket file to magma
